Infobox: children: used children's wikiarticle names: [[Template:Infobox person#Parameters]] / children: "names of independently notable or particularly relevant children" which include their Wikiarticle names – not just first names; name by which the subject is most commonly known (see, [[MOS:FULLNAME]]); avoids reader confusion; also, first name usage is informal, presumptuous, rude, disrespectful, and fails to maintain the professional and formal tone of an encyclopedia

do not restore contentious material without consensus on the talk page
Added peak for foreign troops in Afghanistan in his 1st term and decline in 2nd.

By all accounts there was no economic collapse or humanitarian crisis during Gaddafi's rule. It was a direct result of foreign intervention spearheaded by Obama. It's not even something Obama himself denies. Source also acknowledge it and essentially WP:SKYBLUE. And an overthrow is misleading wording. It implies the person is still alive. It's like saying JFK was overthrown instead of saying he was assassinated.

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1332469665|1332469665]] by [[Special:Contributions/Isjadd773|Isjadd773]] ([[User talk:Isjadd773|talk]]) well, than just add the troop count of the first term in. no need for a removal.

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1332465967|1332465967]] by [[Special:Contributions/Isjadd773|Isjadd773]] ([[User talk:Isjadd773|talk]]) gaddafi was overthrown; whether his death count as a murder should be discussed; the humanitarian crisis also didn't start from the overthrowing.

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1332467735|1332467735]] by [[Special:Contributions/Isjadd773|Isjadd773]] ([[User talk:Isjadd773|talk]]) rankings in linked article list him as more of a median-high among post ww2 potus.

Saying there was a decrease in troops in Afghanistan in his second term, while excluding the fact that troops peaked significantly during his first term, could mislead readers into believing he was against foreign military presence in the country or that this was an accomplishment. Removing.

Removing misleading puffery. This presents him as someone who was universally well regarded. But the linked article and several polls and sources included within it have him topping lists of the worst presidents since WWII.
Adding context. The way this was worded previously could mislead readers into thinking it was an accomplishment.
Added information and newly created category (I think but not 100% the categories are in alphabetical order, or at least some of it)
